real_interview.content: <synch>

IntroV4Confirmation (hi i'm ellie thanks for coming in today i was created to talk to people in a safe and secure environment i'm not a therapist but i'm here to learn about people and would love to learn about you i'll ask a few questions to get us started and please feel free to tell me anything your answers are totally confidential are you ok with this)
yes
okay_confirm (okay)
how_doingV (so how are you doing today)
okay
thats_good (that's good)
where_originally (where are you from originally)
virginia
really (really)
when_LA (when did you move to l_a)
i wanted to live somewhere different than virginia with a little bit more diversity
often_backB (how often do you go back to your hometown)
um once a year maybe
compares_LA (how does it compare to l_a)
it's um
it's a lot slower and there's a lot less to do there
why_LA (why did you move to l_a)
um i wanted to live somewhere different and
a nicer warmer climate and um somewhere where there's a lot more to do and
there's a lot more going on
mm (mm)
adapted_LA (how easy was it for you to get used to living in l_a)
for me it was really easy 'cause i wanted something <someth> it was very different and i wanted something different
mhm (mhm)
like_about_LA (what are some things you really like about l_a)
i like um
i like all the things to do like the museums i like
the beaches and the mountains and all the
hiking and all the free things to do
dont_like_LA (what are some things you don't really like about l_a)
mm people don't appreciate what they have here that just come here and wanna take something but they don't wanna give anything back and
bad drivers
yeah_downer (yeah)
travel_shoes (i'm sure you can tell by my shoes i'm not much of a world explorer do you travel a lot)
uh not as much as i would like to i
travel whenever i can but usually can't afford to that much
understand (i understand)
travel_changed (what do you enjoy about traveling)
mm
well i like taking
i like taking pictures a lot and i just like
exploring new places my wife and i like to see um
wildlife and hike and
monuments and just seeing different areas
cool3 (cool)
travel_trips (i'd love to hear about one of your trips)
um
well <sigh> we
we've gone <go> we went to uh central california we'd like to be able to go
more internationally places but that takes awhile to afford so we've gone more locally so we went to
um
we went to hurst castle and to see the sea lions <li> the um
the
elephant seals and things like that
nice (nice)
memorableB (what's one of your most memorable experiences)
um
i guess our uh
i guess our palm springs trip for our anniversary we did the um
eh we did the tram and a nice hotel and jacuzzi and romantic dinner and it was a good time overall
great_situation (that sounds like a great situation)
shyoutgoing (do you consider yourself more shy or outgoing)
i guess somewhere in between
study (what did you study at school)
english and film
sounds_interesting (that sounds interesting)
hard_decision (how did you decide to do that)
well i uh
was told i needed to go to college and i hadn't quite decided what to do yet so i just
picked something i liked to do for the time being
happy_didthat (are you happy you did that)
well
wish i'd
not been pressured so i had more time to figure out what i wanted to i might've done something different like physical therapy but
mm (mm)
still_working_on_X (are you still working in that)
uh no i've been teaching <t> teaching gymnastics which is something i used to do before
wow (wow)
change_directions (what made you decide to do that)
um
i needed to not starve
and
i did it i didn't end up being as bad as i thought it would be so i went for it and it ended up being kinda fun
thats_good (that's good)
dream_job (what's your dream job)
dream is to have money and not have to work for it
okay_confirm (okay)
control_temper (how are you at controlling your temper)
overall pretty good
last_argument (when was the last time you argued with someone and what was it about)
um
don't remember what about but it probably would've been
few weeks ago with my wife
situation_handled (tell me about a situation that you wish you had handled differently)
um well anyone that i've ever actually gotten upset and
yelled i always wish i wouldn't do that but sometimes when someone's not listening it drives me crazy
give_example (can you give me an example of that)
um you know if i just
saying something over and over and they're just clearly not listening it makes me really upset
yeah_downer (yeah)
hard_decisionB (tell me about the hardest decision you've ever had to make)
um <sigh>
i don't know i
i spend a lot of time on 'em but
i don't i don't know what the hardest one is 'cause eh if i decide to go with something it's you know it's usually for a good reason
uh_huh (uh huh)
feelguilty (what's something you feel guilty about)
well i guess i feel guilty about moving to california and that i left my family in virginia
i mean
<pft> i know i shouldn't but they always seem to miss me and even though they don't like
living there you know i'm the one that moved away so it's like i abandoned them
difficult (how hard is that)
well i mean
i don't miss virginia but i do miss them so i guess a little hard
family_relationship (tell me about your relationship with your family)
uh i have a good relationship with my <deep breath> with my wife with my in-laws with my mom dad and sister there's
no problems everyone gets along well
family_roleB (how close are you to your family)
mm very close
thats_good (that's good)
memory_erase (tell me about an event or something that you wish you could erase from your memory)
um
i mean anything <anyth> anything where someone gets hurt either uh physically or otherwise
easy_sleep (how easy is it for you to get a good night's sleep)
it depends on how much exercise i have
get a lot of exercise it's pretty easy if i don't it's not
sleep_affects (what are you like when you don't sleep well)
um
kind of like right now just a little bit
slow and out of it but
not really um
too different otherwise
uh_huh (uh huh)
feel_lately (how have you been feeling lately)
um just kinda run down 'cause my um
my mother-in-law is is dying and we just spent like three days
uh in the hospital and we're gonna go back after this so not a lot of time to
sleep
im_sorry (i'm sorry)
behavior_changes (have you noticed any changes in your behavior or thoughts lately)
mm
just um
just uh slower <sl> just slower and
more tired and
little more out of it that's all
ptsd_diagnosed (have you ever been diagnosed with p_t_s_d)
no
depression_diagnosed (have you been diagnosed with depression)
no
happy_lasttime (tell me about the last time you felt really happy)
um
usually just when i'm having <havi>
having a fun day either on my own or with my wife that's that's pretty easy for me just getting outside and
and uh and hiking or exercising it's not hard for me
mhm (mhm)
BF_describe (how would your best friend describe you)
i'm not sure maybe um
maybe
mm like
eccentric but in a good way
hopefully
wild_laughter3 ((laughter))
regret (is there anything you regret)
no
advice_back (what advice would you give to yourself ten or twenty years ago)
um
to
be careful with your
to be careful with your
job to make sure you could keep from being injured and to um
i don't know just your <y> just your normal
your normal kind of
uh older kinda wisdom <sigh>
tell_about_that (can you tell me about that)
mm not much to say really everyone realizes things when they get older that they wish they had when they were younger
yeah_downer (yeah)
self_change (what are some things you wish you could change about yourself)
uh i wish i could get rid of my back injury so i could get back into shape like i used to be
that's um
the biggest thing right now
tell_me_moreV2 (can you tell me more about that)
um
not much to say just hurt my back at work and
i just like to get past it 'cause it's
you know holding me back from doing a lot of things that's all
like_what (like what)
um well like i used to do uh gymnastics and trampoline and used to be a lot more active or work out more and now i can only work out a little bit 'cause it hurts too much
that_sucks (that sucks)
ideal_weekendC (tell me how you spend your ideal weekend)
um
probably like during the
during the day going <sigh> going on a hike or to a park with my wife and
uh
enjoying taking pictures and wildlife and exercising and then
at night um you know we watch a movie or go dancing or
just something like that
Ellie17Dec2012_08 (what are you most proud of in your life)
um
most proud of um
proud of moving here i mean i um came here without knowing anyone and
i was at a point where i could've stayed in virginia and gotten comfortable and
you know ended up doing something i regretted but i came out and i've always thought that was a good decision
thats_good (that's good)
influence_positive (who's someone that's been a positive influence in your life)
mm
my parents my grandparents my wife most people in my life have been
asked_everything (okay i think i have asked everything i need to)
appreciate_open (thanks for sharing your thoughts with me)
bye (goodbye)
bye bye
